executive_summary.summary: The website https://plausible.io/ has some accessibility and security issues, but overall scores well in performance, SEO, and best practices.

top_issues.title: Add Missing Security Headers
top_issues.description: Add the missing security headers to the site's configuration.
top_issues.recommendation: Add the missing security headers to the site's configuration, such as 'Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains' to enable HSTS.
top_issues.evidence: Add the missing security headers to the site's configuration.
top_issues.impact: Add the missing security headers to the site's configuration.

top_issues.title: Address Aria-Hidden Attributes
top_issues.description: Ensure that aria-hidden=true is not set on the document body.
top_issues.recommendation: Ensure that aria-hidden=true is not set on the document body to maintain consistent assistive technology behavior.
top_issues.evidence: Ensure that aria-hidden=true is not set on the document body.
top_issues.impact: Ensure that aria-hidden=true is not set on the document body.

top_issues.title: Add Alt Attributes to Images
top_issues.description: Add alt attributes to all images on the page.
top_issues.recommendation: Add alt attributes to all images on the page, providing a brief description of the image content.
top_issues.evidence: Add alt attributes to all images on the page.
top_issues.impact: Add alt attributes to all images on the page.

performance.summary: The page scores 100/100 on performance, with no major issues detected.

findings.evidence: LCP: 1.4 s mobile / 0.4 s desktop; budget 2.5 s
findings.impact: The page's Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) is within the recommended budget, ensuring a good user experience.
findings.recommendation: No action needed; the page's LCP is already optimized.

findings.impact: The page's Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) is 0, indicating no unexpected layout shifts.
findings.recommendation: No action needed; the page's CLS is already optimized.

findings.impact: The page does not have any render-blocking resources, ensuring a fast page load.
findings.recommendation: No action needed; the page does not have any render-blocking resources.

findings.evidence: Estimated savings of 14 KiB from efficient cache lifetimes.
findings.impact: Implementing efficient cache lifetimes can reduce the page's load time.
findings.recommendation: Consider implementing a caching strategy to reduce the page's load time.

accessibility.summary: Automated tooling detects roughly a third of WCAG failures; manual review is required for the categories listed in `manual_review_required`. The site has a score of 64, indicating some accessibility issues.

findings.evidence: The document `<body>` does not have `aria-hidden="true"` set.
findings.impact: Assistive technologies, like screen readers, work inconsistently when `aria-hidden="true"` is set on the document `<body>`.
findings.recommendation: Ensure that `aria-hidden="true"` is not set on the document `<body>` to maintain consistent assistive technology behavior.

findings.evidence: No focusable descendents are present within `[aria-hidden="true"]` elements.
findings.impact: Focusable descendents within an `[aria-hidden="true"]` element prevent those interactive elements from being available to users of assistive technologies like screen readers.
findings.recommendation: Ensure that `[aria-hidden="true"]` elements do not contain focusable descendents to maintain accessibility.

seo.summary: The page has a good SEO score, but there are some areas for improvement. The page is crawlable, has a valid title and meta description, and uses canonical links. However, some images are missing alt attributes.

findings.evidence: The page contains images without alt attributes, which can make it difficult for search engines to understand the content of the images.
findings.impact: This can negatively impact the page's accessibility and search engine rankings.
findings.recommendation: Add alt attributes to all images on the page, providing a brief description of the image content.

security.summary: The site has some security issues, including missing security headers and a potential information disclosure through the sitemap.xml file.

findings.evidence: TLS protocol version is TLSv1.3, which is the latest version.
findings.impact: Using the latest TLS protocol version ensures the site is protected against known vulnerabilities.
findings.recommendation: No action needed, the site is already using the latest TLS protocol version.

findings.evidence: The site is missing the following security headers: strict-transport-security, content-security-policy, x-frame-options, x-content-type-options, and referrer-policy.
findings.impact: Missing security headers can make the site vulnerable to various attacks, such as XSS and clickjacking.
findings.recommendation: Add the missing security headers to the site's configuration. For example, add 'Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains' to enable HSTS.

findings.evidence: The sitemap.xml file contains URLs that may be sensitive, such as https://plausible.io/data-policy.
findings.impact: Exposing sensitive URLs through the sitemap.xml file can provide an attacker with valuable information about the site's structure and potential vulnerabilities.
findings.recommendation: Remove or restrict access to sensitive URLs in the sitemap.xml file to prevent information disclosure.

findings.evidence: No vulnerable libraries were detected by Lighthouse.
findings.impact: The site is not vulnerable to known library vulnerabilities.
findings.recommendation: Continue to monitor the site's dependencies for potential vulnerabilities.

best-practices.summary: The site follows best practices for security, performance, and user experience.

findings.impact: The site is protected against eavesdropping and tampering attacks.
findings.recommendation: Continue to use HTTPS to protect user data.

findings.evidence: The site does not request geolocation permission on page load.
findings.impact: Users are not prompted for geolocation permission without context.
findings.recommendation: Continue to avoid requesting geolocation permission on page load.

findings.evidence: The site does not request notification permission on page load.
findings.impact: Users are not prompted for notification permission without context.
findings.recommendation: Continue to avoid requesting notification permission on page load.

findings.evidence: The site allows users to paste into input fields.
findings.impact: Users can easily enter data into input fields.
findings.recommendation: Continue to allow users to paste into input fields.
